---
title: "Papers' Summaries"
highlight-style: atom-one
listing:
  contents:
    - papers-summaries
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  page-size: 50
image-align: left
page-layout: full
css: assets/listing.css
---

Structured summaries of foundational and influential papers in ML, DL, NLP, and LLM systems. Each summary distills the paper's thesis, methods, contributions, and my takeaways — designed to be useful as both a first encounter and a quick refresher.
